Since 2018 I’ve had the chance to attend multiple comic cons and take photos with many people I admire, as a professional cosplayer. If you’ve followed my journey thus far or even scrolled back to my earlier posts on IG you’d know these photos exist even before AI. They’re precious memories of my journey that I’m proud of. 
It’s sad that in these days and age people kept saying everything is AI. I’m transparent about my work. If something is AI I will say it is. There is no need to lie.

It’s my birthday ❤️ Thank you for all the well wishes ❤️ I’m very grateful.
This year out of the traditional way of calling up my “friends” for a birthday party, I just take it slow and hope to celebrate by myself. However, the warm wishes and presents from people I barely know filled my heart and made this one of the best birthdays in a while. I’m glad I changed my way in life and are now surrounded by warm people.

My experience at @bar_centifolia and everything I tried ❤️#tokyo #barcentifolia #travel

Had an amazing time at @bar_centifolia last night! The most amazing performance and drinks I have ever had ❤️ Everyone was friendly and amazing, and the experience is surreal ❤️ Even got to hold the cute Yuzo-san’s Ted bear and received a cute Ted as present ❤️ Definitely will make this a yearly visit trip ❤️
